title: Local AI vs Cloud: Why Your Excel Data Shouldn't Go To Azure! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof argues that sensitive data in Excel should remain on-premises rather than sent to cloud services like Azure for AI integration. The recommendation emphasizes privacy preservation and risk avoidance through local model deployment.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof makes the case for keeping sensitive Excel data on-premises instead of routing it to cloud services like Azure for AI integration. The argument rests on privacy preservation and risk avoidance: running models locally keeps the data inside the local environment rather than exposing it to an external service. The takeaway is a preference for local inference and edge deployment when the underlying spreadsheet data is sensitive.
